MINI MINUTES FOR JUL-14-2020 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 302

DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF NICHOLAS KLEIN'S MOTION TO COMPEL DISCOVERY RESPONSES. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO COMPEL DEFENDANT, GABRIEL MENA, TO RESPOND TO FORM INTERROGATORIES, CONSTRUCTION, SET ONE; FORM INTERROGATORIES, GENERAL SET ONE; AND REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION SET ONE IS GRANTED. THE DEFENDANT SHALL SERVE FULL AND COMPLETE VERIFIED RESPONSES, WITHOUT OBJECTION, WITHIN FIFTEEN DAYS OF THE DATE OF THIS ORDER. MONETARY SANCTIONS IN THE SUM OF $1,047.50 IS AWARDED SOLELY AGAINST THE DEFENDANT AS COSTS AND ATTORNEY FEES IN CONNECTION WITH THE FILING OF THIS MOTION WHICH MUST BE PAID WITHIN THE AFORESAID FIFTEEN DAYS. THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER REPEATING VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING APPROVED AS TO FORM AND SEND DIRECTLY TO THE JUDGE PRO TEM AT SBS@SBSLAWSF.COM. JUDGE PRO TEM: STEVEN STEIN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. =(302/JPT)

Motion To Compel Discovery Responses
Off Calendar Jul-14-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF NICHOLAS KLEIN's Motion To Compel Discovery Responses.

Plaintiff's motion to compel defendant, Gabriel Mena, to respond to Form Interrogatories, Construction, Set One; Form Interrogatories, General Set One; and Request for Production Set One is granted. The defendant shall serve full and complete verified responses, without objection, within fifteen days of the date of this order. Monetary sanctions in the sum of $1,047.50 is awarded solely against the defendant as costs and attorney fees in connection with the filing of this motion which must be paid within the aforesaid fifteen days.

The prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling approved as to form and send directly to the Judge Pro Tem at sbs@sbslawsf.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Steven Stein, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
